heading: Reservation of reservoir sites generally
label: 662 Reservation of reservoir sites generally
text: Sites for reservoirs and other hydraulic works necessary for the storage and utilization of water for irrigation and the prevention of floods and overflows, located or selected prior to , shall remain segregated and reserved from entry, or settlement, until otherwise provided by law, and reservoir sites thereafter located or selected on public lands shall in like manner be reserved from the date of the location or selection thereof.August 30, 1890
notes: CodificationSection is based on provisions contained in acts , and , affected by act .Oct. 2, 1888Aug. 30, 1890Oct. 21, 1976

Amendments1976— struck out provision authorizing the President, in his discretion, to open by proclamation any portion or all of the lands reserved by this section to settlement under the homestead laws.Pub. L. 94–579
